description:
Overview:

【4-in-1 Innovative Design】 These deformable fidget toys are innovatively designed by the new pop tubes. The deformable limbs bring flexible shapes, which bring challenges and fun to your fingers and brain. the tube can be popped and stretched with a crisp sound when stretched.
【High Quality 】The animal Pop Tubes Toys is made of high-quality plastic, which is durable and smooth to use. Pop tubes are durable, thick, and flexible and can withstand a lot of fidgeting, party favors for kids.
【Stress & Anxiety Relief Toys】They can help us reduce some of the stress in life, study and work, and ease everyone's anxiety. after some work, you can play with it to let your mind rest and have a little fun for a break The flexible body can help the development of intelligence and imagination, especially for people with autism and hyperactivity disorder.
【Perfect Gifts】These deformable pressure toys are perfect gifts for children and adults.


Product information :
Toy material: plastic
Color: giraffe pink without lights, giraffe blue without lights, giraffe purple without lights, giraffe yellow without lights, giraffe pink with lights, giraffe blue with lights, giraffe purple with lights, giraffe yellow with lights.

Size Information:



Packing list:
Decompression toy *1
